mapper.delete:
delete from production_batch where order_line_id in
#{orderLineId}
mapper.insert:
insert into production_batch( batch_id, order_line_id, batch_qty, status, planned_start, planned_end, create_time, update_time) values
( #{item.batchId}, #{item.orderLineId}, #{item.batchQty}, #{item.status}, #{item.plannedStart}, #{item.plannedEnd}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime})
